channel.title: Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer

item.title: 6sense: From Hackathons to AI Pipelines
item.description: A 4.5-year journey scaling frontend architectures, merging acquisitions, building big data pipelines, and shipping Generative AI infrastructure.

item.title: AI Email Writer — LLM-Powered Outbound at Scale
item.description: Built an LLM email generation system processing 1,500+ emails daily with multi-layer guardrails, achieving 42% reply rates.

item.title: AI Account Summary — 20K+ Daily AI Summaries
item.description: Built an AI engine generating 20,000+ account summaries daily with buying stage predictions, intent insights, and next-action recommendations.

item.title: OrangeSomething — Founding Engineer at a Blinkit-Incubated D2C Brand
item.description: Led the full tech stack for a D2C beauty platform incubated at Blinkit — migrated from Shopify to React (12s → 3s load) and built a native Android app.

item.title: Big Data Engineering: Optimizing PySpark Pipelines at 6sense
item.description: Owned critical big data infrastructure handling millions of signals daily. Optimized a core PySpark DAG saving 45 mins/day and retired legacy systems to save $130K annually.

item.title: Ape Unit — Blockchain Explorer & Team Building in Berlin
item.description: Led development of a blockchain explorer for the Aeternity network and managed a new tech team of four developers across India and Berlin.

item.title: Building with RAG and Vector Databases
item.description: Designing advanced LLM architectures using Retrieval-Augmented Generation to ground AI responses in proprietary data.

item.title: TransformNow — A PWA for Healthy Living
item.description: Designed and developed a Progressive Web App with 30+ pages scoring 90+ on Lighthouse for performance, accessibility, and SEO.

item.title: LifeBlocks: Trustless Certificate Verification on Ethereum
item.description: Developed a blockchain system using Solidity and React enabling institutions to issue verifiable digital certificates.

item.title: Transcend Labs — Marketplace Automation & Inventory Management
item.description: Built a full-stack inventory management solution and a price-tracking Repricer app with SMS notifications for eBay, Amazon, and Discogs.

item.title: Faculty360 — Faculty Recruitment Platform
item.description: Developed the frontend for a faculty recruitment and management platform for educational institutions.
